title: 有馬記念の後に・世界、瞬いて

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff! Wheeze! Puff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (My legs! I'm going to fa—)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hold on, I've got you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You ran spectacularly, Dober. Can you walk?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove... I'm sorry... You don't have to—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Lean on me all you want, and don't talk unless
you really must. I'll walk with you to the winner's
circle.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Your fans are awaiting your triumphant return,
champion.

text_block_list.name: Dober's Fans
text_block_list.text:
Wooooo! Dober! Dober! You were incredible!
Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Urgh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(...It's useless. I don't have the energy to face
them...)

text_block_list.name: Groove's Fans
text_block_list.text: Air Groove! You were so, so close! You did great!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (Air Groove...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Will I ever be able to carry myself like her?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: At the very least...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Wow. I can't believe Mejiro Dober clinched the
win! But... she's barely standing. Do you think
she's okay?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, yeah, she certainly doesn't have
McQueen's consistency. I doubt she'll be able to
snag a victory next time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Dober...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The following day, I find myself watching the rain
come down from inside my office.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm trying to get some work done in my office
when Mejiro Dober walks in.
choice_data_list: You want to use my TV? What for?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Bright told me that a program about this year's
classic racers is about to start.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
They'll probably cover yesterday's Arima Kinen
too. I figured I should give it a watch.
choice_data_list: Oh, good idea!
Oh, good idea!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since Mejiro Dober managed to come in first at
the Arima Kinen yesterday, the program is bound
to feature her prominently!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hopefully, this will help convince her that she's
getting closer to building a new Mejiro legacy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Is that a yes? I'll turn it on, then.

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Moving on... Didn't Dober's performance at the
Japanese Oaks remind you of Mejiro Ramonu?

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Ah, the Dark Duchess! She sure was something. I
still have the image of her running etched in my
mind!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Commentator A
text_block_list.text:
We can't talk about the Arima Kinen without
mentioning Mejiro Palmer and her back-to-back
Grand Prix victories! Her runaway style is the stuff
of dreams.
choice_data_list: (What the...)

text_block_list.name: Commentator B
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Mejiro Bright win the Triple Crown also
brought back memories of Mejiro Ryan. You can't
help but want to cheer for her, you know?

text_block_list.name: Commentator C
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. And we mustn't forget the spring Tenno
Sho if we're talking about the Mejiro family!
Mejiro McQueen was so impressive in it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As the segment continues, Legacies of the Mejiro Family flashes across the screen, and footage of past Mejiros' feats is played back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The commentators continue lauding the bygone
Mejiros' achievements, and the social media
comments at the bottom of the screen do much
the same.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And that's how the program ends.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What...
choice_data_list: What the hell was that?!
What the hell was that?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The words fly from my trembling lips without me
realizing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright and Mejiro Dober have done
fantastically throughout their classic year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And yet, no one was praising them for their
accomplishments. It was as if they were just there
to help highlight the other racers.
choice_data_list: That was ridiculous!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Let it go.
choice_data_list: But—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I said let it go! To be honest, I knew this would
happen...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Yesterday during the Arima Kinen, I could tell
how intense the senior racers were—and how
inadequate I was next to them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
The people I admire—Ramonu, Ryan, and so
many more—are on a level so high, I can't even
comprehend it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It was fine when all I was doing was blindly
worshipping them. I was simply proud and dazzled
by how brilliantly Ryan and the others shone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I thought all I had to do was follow directly in
their footsteps.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It wasn't until I started chasing after them in
earnest that I realized how crushingly steep the
trail they blazed is.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
And the closer I get to their light, the more I find
myself imprisoned in their shadows!
choice_data_list: Dober...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...They're so far away.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I promised Bright that we'd forge new legacies as
the next generation of Mejiros, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I didn't realize how unfathomably far I would have
to go in order to reach that light.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm still so weak... so pathetic...
choice_data_list: But you've never given up!
But you've never given up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She looks up in surprise, and I lock eyes with her.
choice_data_list:
And I should know. I've been by your side this
whole time.

And I should know. I've been by your side this
whole time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'll tell her as many times as I need, but Mejiro
Dober did an incredible job during her classic
year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
The truth is, I haven't managed to stop my
shaking...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Despite knowing the real reason why I shake, I'm
still scared. Even so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter how hard she was trembling or how
dispirited she felt, she always rose to the
challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I know better than anyone how brilliant the mark
she's left on racing history is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I know how much work she's put in over the past
two years, trying to forge her legacy.
choice_data_list:
I won't let anyone look down on all your hard
work! Not even you!

I won't let anyone look down on all your hard
work! Not even you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't care how many times I have to say it until
she believes me. I'll say it a million times if I have
to.
choice_data_list: Mejiro Dober, you are an incredible racer.
Mejiro Dober, you are an incredible racer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ... All right, I'm mad.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm so mad and disappointed, Trainer! Hic... Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The pounding rain that falls on the turf outside
seems to mirror the stream of tears spilling down
Mejiro Dober's cheeks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I know it's my job to wipe her tears, but I can't
stop my own from falling. Tearfully, we swear to
make a comeback from this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And before we know it, the rain stops.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: We still haven't discussed our next goal, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I want to run in the Osaka Hai.
choice_data_list:
That's one of the races in the senior spring
Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Osaka Hai, the spring Tenno Sho, and the
Takarazuka Kinen comprise the conventional
path the best senior racers take.
choice_data_list: All the more reason to run in it, right?
All the more reason to run in it, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. I don't want to give up the fight. And I'm
not going to abandon the promise I made with
Bright. Not yet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
We still have to forge new Mejiro legacies
together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next goal is now the Osaka Hai! We'll shoot
the flare signaling Mejiro Dober's comeback right
there amid the cherry trees at Hanshin!
